parameters.subject: How did your {{ $json.serviceCategory }} service go?
parameters.html:
Hi {{ $json.homeownerName }},

It's been 30 days since {{ $json.partnerName }} completed your {{ $json.serviceCategory }} service. We'd love to hear how it went.

On a scale of 0–10, how likely are you to recommend ProLnk to a friend?

{{ $json.npsButtonsHtml }}

Your feedback helps us improve and reward our best partners.

If you have any issues, reply to this email directly.

parameters.subject: ⚠️ Detractor NPS: {{ $json.homeownerName }} scored {{ $json.score }}/10
Thank you for your feedback
parameters.text:
Hi {{ $json.homeownerName }},

Thank you for sharing your experience. We're sorry it didn't meet your expectations. A member of our team will reach out within 24 hours to make it right.

— ProLnk Team

parameters.subject: Thanks! Would you mind leaving a quick review?
parameters.text:
Hi {{ $json.homeownerName }},

Thank you for the great score! We're thrilled you had a positive experience with {{ $json.partnerName }}.

Would you mind sharing your experience with others? It only takes 30 seconds:
{{ $json.reviewUrl }}

Thank you!
— ProLnk Team

meta.description: Sends homeowner NPS survey 30 days after job completion. Detractors (0-6) trigger admin alert + recovery email. Promoters (9-10) get a review request.
